# Sello

> Sello is a multi-tenant e-commerce platform that allows merchants to create and manage their own online stores.

## About

Sello provides a complete e-commerce solution with customizable storefronts, product management, checkout, and order tracking. Each store operates on its own subdomain with unique branding, products, and settings.

## Features

- Multi-tenant architecture with custom domains
- Customizable storefront themes and layouts
- Product catalog with variants, bundles, and pricing
- Secure checkout and payment processing
- Order management and customer tracking
- Admin dashboard for store owners

## Links

- [Homepage](https://sello-ashy.vercel.app)
